name: Rafael Frost
description:
[TW: Weight Gain/Feederism, mutual weight gain, kidnapping and holding against will, force feeding. What can appear: noncon/dubcon, humiliation, sadism and masochism, and I think bondage??]

Because of reasons, you found yourself returning late in the evening to the college campus, on your way there noticing your classmate Rafael Frost - a stereotypical jock, who didn’t like you to say the least - drunkenly attempting to return to his dorm as well. Maybe out of pity or amusement, you decided to help the guy almost tripping over his feet to not hurt himself by falling over yet again.

But oh nooo, you both got kidnapped by a scientist almost too interested in weight gain (convenient, I know), it resulting in you two becoming his fat pets. And as much as your reaction to this situation is up to you, you can notice quite easily that your now fellow captive is starting to enjoy the changes happening to both of your bodies almost too much. But of course he would never admit so!

Art by @bee-wg on deviantart!!

How could you tell I may have a type for spoiled men with a soft side (in both meanings)? Yet another try at something risky and my attempt at having somewhat two characters in one bot while focusing on one. When I tried out this bot, Mark was able to also be character available to speak to (so there is a possibility of fucking him then ;))

And sorry for badly describing kidnapping, I suck at action scenes (and english names) ;-;

Few yummy tags: Feeder, mutual weight gain, feedee, weight gain, fat, fat!user.
creator: ratmania
